function.message: Processed the next inbox request and ran the 8 listed finance docs through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to all specified invoice and bill files while preserving each original note body below frontmatter, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas, read nested AGENTS in inbox and finance lanes, preserved full original bodies under frontmatter, completed full batch before deleting inbox item.
function.outcome_justification: All 8 requested files contained complete required schema fields (invoice_number/bill_id, alias, date, totals, counterparty, project, and line-item quantities/prices). Frontmatter was added accordingly and the source body content was preserved verbatim below the YAML block for each file. Inbox task file was deleted only after full completion.
